Flow:   split(strike, maturity, encAmount, proof)     -> receives encrypted cWETH from user     -> mints equal stableETH + upETH amounts   merge(strike, maturity, encAmount, proof)     -> burns equal stableETH + upETH amounts     -> returns cWETH to user   settle(strike, maturity, oraclePrice)     -> callable only after maturity     -> sets payout ratios (as encrypted fixed-point per token)     -> users redeem via redeem() All deposit amounts, token balances, and payouts stay encrypted. Oracle price enters plaintext then is used in FHE
